session_memos_active_label_unique.name: session_memos_active_label_unique
session_memos_active_label_unique.where: "session_memos"."deleted_at" is null and "session_memos"."label" is not null

session_memos_expires_at_idx.name: session_memos_expires_at_idx
session_memos_expires_at_idx.where: "session_memos"."deleted_at" is null and "session_memos"."expires_at" is not null
